title: AL_Sale_V1_Input_Schema
description: Deterministic field constraints for the Step-1 unanchored commerce substrate.

payer.description: The cryptographic identity, ENS domain, or system identifier of the originating asset sender.

payee.description: The target identity, ENS domain, or system wallet receiving the asset transfer.

amount.description: The exact transaction value expressed as a string to prevent floating-point precision loss.

currency.description: The ISO currency code or network-native token ticker symbol.

payment_method.description: The rails used to settle the state transfer.

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the state initiation.

external_ref.description: The external reference identifier tracking the settlement layer.
